creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Since my attached email to bug-followup@freebsd.org is always in
fess code , I have to send my revised diff file as a new PR.


On Sun, Aug 31, 2008 at 9:20 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of math/py-sympy,
>
> Please note that PR ports/126994 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126994
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
